title: Review readiness stabilization ordering
outOfScope: Changing the meaning of external platform approval

sources.reason: Promote review readiness only after stabilization evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Readiness must not become ready before status, risk, and Summary stabilization completes.

executionDecision.reason: The ordering rule is deterministic and covered by regression tests.

preReviewWarnings: Review final status consistency after readiness promotion.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Review readiness is promoted only after all stabilization checks pass.
Final cockpit status is regenerated from the promoted readiness signal.
Regression tests cover incomplete stabilization evidence.
All Work Item and project checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The previous ordering could derive readiness before status, risk, and Summary stabilization had completed.
constraints: Keep existing verification IDs and fail-closed behavior.
intent.rationale: Readiness is a final signal and must be calculated from the stabilized evidence set.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
